baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, legacy dashboard context bundle
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs building summary, overview, full, readiness, collaboration guide, and repo snapshot through the legacy path that reloads overlapping surfaces

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, preloaded dashboard context bundle
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs building the same dashboard context bundle while reusing one shared preloaded surface set across context packs, readiness, and repo snapshot generation

environment.note: The preloaded path preserves the legacy distinction between quest scope used by context packs and quest scope used by standalone readiness scoring.
